customer_message: My router stopped working this morning and I need it fixed today
response: I'd be happy to help! **When did you last successfully use the router, and have you tried unplugging it for 30 seconds and plugging it back in?**

customer_message: It was working fine yesterday. Yes I tried unplugging it and it still won't connect.
response: I'd be happy to help! What device isn't connecting – is it a printer, router, monitor, or something else?

customer_message: I'm having troubles with my router
response:
Hi there! I'd be happy to help you with your router. 

**What specific issue are you experiencing?** (For example: no internet connection, slow speeds, won't turn on, etc.)

customer_message: it was working fine yesterday and all I have right now is a red light and I keep doing the reset and nothing fixes it
response: Thanks for that detail! A red light usually indicates a connection issue. **Is your modem (the device that connects to your internet provider) powered on and showing a normal light?**

customer_message: yes, the modem is working fine. I also reset that as well it came back on the light is green. I followed all the steps on the website to fix the router. All the connections are made. I just reset it again and now it won't power on.
response:
I completely understand your frustration—you've done everything right, and now the router won't even power on after multiple resets. That's definitely concerning, and I appreciate your patience in troubleshooting.

**At this point, you need to speak with one of our technical specialists who can look into this further.** This sounds like it may be a hardware issue that requires hands-on support.

Here's how to reach us:

📞 **Call 1-800-RETAILCORE** and reference your router issue, or if you prefer, **we'll have a human representative call you back within 10 minutes** (during business hours).

Our team will be able to walk you through any remaining options or discuss a replacement if needed. You shouldn't have to keep troubleshooting on your own at this point.

Is there anything else I can note for the representative before they contact you?
